title: lessingia glandulifera
intro: Lessingia glandulifera, also known as Pacific Mountain Pride, is a flowering plant native to the western coast of North America, particularly in the mountainous regions of California, Oregon, and Washington. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lessingia glandulifera are often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, and are traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and other health issues.
